templates.name: api_openai_sora_video
templates.title: Sora 2: Text & Image to Video
templates.description: Generate videos from text prompts and optional reference images using OpenAI’s Sora-2 or Sora-2 Pro, with synchronized audio. This workflow calls a third-party API; input image size must match desired video dimensions. Execution time depends on server-side response.

inputs: image: Optional reference image that sets the visual style or starting frame for the video
outputs: video: Generated video with synchronized audio

templates.name: api_stability_ai_i2i
templates.title: Stability AI: Image to Image
templates.description: Transform a reference image using Stability AI’s image generation model for image-to-image generation. The workflow takes an input image and text prompt to produce a transformed version, supporting professional editing and style transfer. Execution relies on a third-party API, with run times depending on server-side response.

inputs: image: Input reference image to transform
text: Text prompt guiding the image transformation

templates.name: api_stability_ai_sd3.5_i2i
templates.title: Stability AI: SD3.5 Image to Image
templates.description: This workflow uses Stability AI’s Stable Diffusion 3.5 via a third‑party API for image‑to‑image generation. It accepts a reference image and text prompt, then produces a new image guided by the input at 1‑megapixel resolution for professional‑grade results.

inputs: image: Input reference image to guide generation
text: Text prompt describing the desired output

templates.name: api_stability_ai_stable_image_ultra_t2i
templates.title: Stability AI: Stable Image Ultra Text to Image
templates.description: Generate high-quality 1‑megapixel images from text prompts using Stability AI's Stable Image Ultra model, offering excellent prompt adherence. This workflow takes a text description as input and outputs a high-resolution image via a third‑party API, with response time dependent on server load. Designed for professional text-to-image generation.

inputs: text: Text prompt describing the desired image

templates.name: api_stability_ai_sd3.5_t2i
templates.title: Stability AI: SD3.5 Text to Image
templates.description: Generate images from text prompts using Stability AI’s SD3.5 model, with optional image-to-image guidance from a reference image. Produces high-quality outputs at 1 megapixel resolution with strong prompt adherence. This workflow calls a third-party API, so execution time depends on server-side response.

inputs: text: Text prompt describing the desired image
image: Optional reference image for image-to-image guidance

templates.name: api_ideogram_v3_t2i
templates.title: Ideogram V3: Text to Image
templates.description: Generate professional-quality images from text prompts using the Ideogram V3 API. This text-to-image workflow accepts a descriptive text input and returns a generated image with strong prompt alignment, photorealism, and accurate text rendering. Execution relies on a third-party API; response time depends on server-side processing.

inputs: text: Text prompt describing the desired image

templates.name: api_stability_ai_audio_to_audio
templates.title: Stable Audio 2.5: Audio to Audio
templates.description: Transform existing audio samples into new compositions using Stable Audio 2.5, guided by text instructions. Provide an input audio file and a description of the desired transformation, then receive a new audio composition as output. This workflow executes via a third-party API.

inputs: audio: Input audio sample to transform into a new composition
text: Text instructions describing the desired audio transformation
outputs: audio: Generated audio composition transformed from the input using Stable Audio 2.5

templates.name: api_stability_ai_text_to_audio
templates.title: Stable Audio 2.5: Text to Audio
templates.description: Generate high-quality music and sound effects from text descriptions using Stability AI's Stable Audio 2.5 model. The user provides a text prompt describing the desired audio and receives a generated audio file. This workflow calls a third-party API, so execution time depends on server-side response.

inputs: text: Text prompt describing the desired music or sound effect
outputs: audio: Generated audio from the text prompt using Stable Audio 2.5

templates.name: api_stability_ai_audio_inpaint
templates.title: Stability Audio 2.5: Audio Inpainting
templates.description: Use Stable Audio 2.5 to inpaint or extend an existing audio clip by providing a sample and text instructions. The model regenerates or completes the audio according to your description. Execution relies on a third-party API, so response time may vary.

inputs: audio: Input audio sample to inpaint or extend
text: Text instructions describing the desired audio modification or extension
outputs: audio: Inpainted or extended audio using Stable Audio 2.5

templates.name: api_stability_upscale_fast
templates.title: Stability AI: Image Upscale fast
templates.description: Upload a low-quality or compressed image to upscale it 4x via the Stability AI API. The workflow enhances sharpness and reduces artifacts for a cleaner high-resolution output. This calls a third-party API, so execution time depends on server response.

inputs: image: Input low-quality or compressed image to upscale
outputs: image: Output 4x upscaled image with enhanced sharpness
